General.Name: Q P Group Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Q P Group Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and trades in paper products in the People's Republic of China, the United States, Europe, and internationally. The company operates through two segments, Web Sales and Original Equipment Manufacturer (OEM) Sales. It offers tabletop games, playing cards, puzzles, greeting cards, educational items, and packaging services. The company also provides printing, laboratory testing, information technology support, and design services; and cyber security services and solutions. In addition, it engages in property holding activities; sales of website products; and trading and retailing of merchandise; wholesale of paper, paper products, and packaging materials; and sources materials and products. The company sells its products to OEM customers, as well as to individual and corporate customers through online sales channels. The company was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in Sha Tin, Hong Kong. Q P Group Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Good Elite Holdings Limited.
General.Address: Kings Wing Plaza 2, Sha Tin, Hong Kong
